mapper.select: SELECT * FROM price_alert WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM price_alert WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO price_alert ( user_id, entity_code, entity_type, entity_name, alert_type, threshold, target_change_percent, base_price, current_value, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.symbol}, #{item.symbolType}, #{item.symbolName}, #{item.alertType}, #{item.targetPrice}, #{item.targetChangePercent}, #{item.basePrice}, #{item.currentValue}, #{item.isActive}, NOW(), NOW() )
